message:
test(engine): add enrichment tests for kernelized shift guard and semantic dark matter engine

Add ~190 lines of unit tests to each module covering custom config
construction, shift/promotion detection, expansion triggering, board
freshness/state, content hash, epoch propagation, summary counters,
reset, history, error Display impls, specimen family coverage, and
corpus evidence hash uniqueness. Fix minor style issues in neighboring
enrichment integration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
